prevalence.trend: stable; burden tied to smoking history

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to chronic respiratory disability

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Spirometry with airflow limitation and imaging findings; assess COPD phenotype

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; diagnosis based on symptoms and spirometry
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with smoking cessation and guideline-based inhaler therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Spirometry and imaging widely available in pulmonary services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Smoking cessation, inhaled bronchodilators, pulmonary rehab, vaccinations; oxygen for advanced disease
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong access to diagnostics and COPD management programs
